title: Oil prices, stock futures inch higher as U.S. and Iran reportedly agree to halt attacks
summary: Oil prices and U.S. stock-index futures rose Sunday as the U.S. and Iran reportedly agreed to halt attacks following weekend military exchanges in the Persian Gulf. This diplomatic agreement eases concerns about Middle East oil supply disruptions. The development signals potential de-escalation after a period of heightened regional tensions.
content: Oil prices rose Sunday while U.S. stock-index futures advanced, after the U.S. and Iran reportedly agreed to halt attacks after repeatedly exchanging fire in the Persian Gulf over the weekend.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗据报同意停止攻击，油价和股指期货小幅上涨
zh.summary: 周日，美国和伊朗据报同意停止攻击，导致油价和美国股指期货上升。波斯湾周末军事交换后，这一外交协议缓解了对中东油气供应中断的担忧。这一发展表明在经历地区紧张局势加剧后可能出现缓和的迹象。

title: Stock futures edge higher, Asia mixed as renewed U.S.-Iran attacks push oil prices up: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures advanced amid a mixed Asian session and renewed U.S.-Iran tensions that pushed oil prices higher. Wall Street is rotating investments away from technology stocks toward other market sectors. The market continues to digest broader economic shifts while navigating geopolitical risks.
content: Wall Street is coming off a mixed week, characterized by a rotation out of tech and into other parts of the stock market.

zh.title: 美伊冲突升级推高油价，股指期货小幅上涨，亚洲市场走势混合：实时更新
zh.summary: 在亚洲市场表现混合且美伊冲突升级推高油价的背景下，美国股指期货上升。华尔街正在将投资从科技股轮转到其他市场板块。市场继续消化更广泛的经济变化，同时应对地缘政治风险。

title: Oil rises as renewed U.S.-Iran strikes reignite Middle East supply fears
summary: Oil prices edged higher on Monday following renewed military strikes between the U.S. and Iran. The fresh hostilities have reignited concerns about potential disruptions to crude supplies from the Middle East. Traders remain cautious about regional stability affecting global energy markets.
content: Oil edged higher on Monday after renewed military strikes between the U.S. and Iran reignited concerns over crude supplies from the Middle East.

zh.title: 美伊冲突升级重燃中东供应担忧，油价上升
zh.summary: 周一，美国和伊朗之间新一轮军事打击后，油价小幅上升。这些新的敌对行动重燃了对中东原油供应可能中断的担忧。交易员对地区稳定性影响全球能源市场保持谨慎态度。
